description: You are an independent insurance adjuster. Create a formal Property Loss Report in Apache OpenOffice Writer using the claim details from '/home/ga/Documents/claim_data.json' and the three images in '/home/ga/Documents/site_photos/'. The report must include a header with the Insurance Carrier, Claim Number, and Date of Loss. It should contain four main sections using 'Heading 1' style: 'Loss Information' (including Insured Name and Address), 'Cause of Loss' (containing the narrative text), 'Scope of Repairs' (featuring a table of repair items, quantities, unit costs, totals, and a Grand Total), and 'Photographic Evidence' (displaying the images with their specific captions from the JSON). Save the completed report to '/home/ga/Documents/Claim_778492_Report.odt'.
